blended.narrative: Mad River Glen is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. The 14-day outlook shows 9 inches total. Mild temps with highs near 51°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Sunday: 2.9" of snow, highs of 29°F. Expect variable conditions.
Monday: 2.0" of snow, highs of 40°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
